title: Ravenbrooks Cr - Hello Neighbor
description: RavenbrooksCraft is a 'Hello Neighbor' mod for Minecraft that captures the early art style from the early prototype to (some) early Alpha 2.
body:
RavenbrooksCraft is a 'Hello Neighbor' mod for Minecraft that captures the early art style from the early prototype to early Alpha 2 (Alpha 1.5).


The mod itself can be considered a furniture, building, and security mod for Adventure Mode _(or survival with mining fatigue X_), or roleplay. Build maps and minigames to create your own Ravenbrooks environment.


**QUICK CREDITS:** I'd like to thank everyone from both Hello Neighbor _(and special Hello Neighbor Reborn fangame)_ and Mcreator communities for helping with assets, feedback, and general coding! I'd like to also mention that the roof block design & cross board planks come from **Hearth&Home** Mod by **Starfish_Studios**! I'd recommend to play my mod with theirs for extra home-like decorations for your Ravenbrooks Town.
Big thanks to **porta1_master09** for helping me with the new and updated promo screenshots.
The new metal chain fences texture/looks are from **'Dustrial Decor** Mod by **BlueDuck & wdspc123**
I would like to also personally thank **JosheryLemon** who assisted me with car models and other objects, and **1Gold1** for helping finding models, textures, and playtest.


**GAME MECHANICS:**
- Use right-click to interact or pick up objects (objects with actions need shift held down to pick up).
- Man-traps (bear-traps) and vases give glowing effect when the player is punished.
- Cupboards turn the player invisible when hiding inside.
- Hammers and crowbars can remove any boarding planks with right click.
- Keys can unlock/re-lock their respective locks using right click.
- Shovels can dig grave dirt using right click.
- Jackhammer can break fault bricks using right click.
- Tomatoes thrown at players give them blindness.
- Glues thrown at players give them slowness.
- Rocks can break windows.
- Window Glass Block can repair broken windows with right click.
- Lockpicks have a 40% chance to open locks & 100% chance on Neutral Locks, one time use.
- Fireworks blind players in its punishing range
- Wireless energy/redstone using wands
- Kettle can be heated over the Stove
- The neighbor's car front can be triggered on impact
- Neighbor Axe can break windows and doors, among other things
- Invisible signs where you can type in a secret message (requires UV light)


**OTHER QUIRKS:**
- Most if not all blocks have their own custom sounds (e.g. Raven Grass has the 22-ish grass footsteps from the original game).
- Television (and its broken alt in extras) has all TV sounds and few custom sounds (strictly from the franchise).
- Radio (and its broken alt in extras) has all radio sounds and few custom sounds (strictly from the franchise).
- Box stacking is a thing again, but better! Also makes you jump a bit higher.
- Chase music key binds (head to controls, key binds). They're Mr. Peterson's chases ONLY!! (lore-wise included). This means secret neighbor's chase wasn't included for being (technically) The Thing's chase music.
- Neighbor soundboard from hn1 and hn2 key binds. Its exactly how it sounds like.
- Most wooden floors have chances of playing a random creaking noise or a random_inside sound effect from the prototype.
- Objects are held like in the games
- Ride-able chairs, armchairs, and sofas.
- If you pan over a stove, it makes an unique cooking sound
